chapter_title.en: Chapter on Performing sa'i While Riding and Sitting Between Safa and Marwah

text: 2854 - وَ رَوَى عَنْهُ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ عَبْدُ اَلرَّحْمَنِ بْنُ أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ قَالَ : «لاَ تَجْلِسْ بَيْنَ اَلصَّفَا وَ اَلْمَرْوَةِ إِلاَّ مِنْ جَهْدٍ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications: Hadith.2854 - Abdul Rahman ibn Abi Abdullah narrated from Imam (as) who said: "Do not sit between Safa and Marwah except out of necessity."
